## Summary

- What changed and why?
- Which module(s) are impacted?

## Test Plan

- [ ] Local smoke test completed for affected module(s)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] Relevant lint checks pass

## UI Quality Gates (Required for UI Changes)

- [ ] Reviewed and satisfied `docs/ui-visual-regression-checklist.md`
- [ ] Reviewed and satisfied `docs/ui-professionalism-checklist.md`

### Visual / UX Verification

- [ ] No clipped text in inputs/selects/chips
- [ ] Laptop viewport (13"-14") remains usable without layout breakage
- [ ] Sticky headers/columns do not block interactions
- [ ] Empty/loading/error states are consistent and readable
- [ ] Focus states and keyboard interactions still work (`/`, `j/k`, `Enter`, `Esc` where applicable)

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback approach (if needed):
